findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 44. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: The NC Waste Management Environmental Quality logo appears in the PDF header but is not rendered in the HTML version.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 shows the NC tree logo with 'Waste Management ENVIRONMENTAL QUALITY' text at top left. The HTML page 1 shows the same logo image. However, comparing rendering quality, both versions include the logo, so this is actually acceptable.

findings.description: The HTML fabricates an email link for elizabeth.werner@ncdenr.gov. While the PDF's digital signature block contains the email 'elizabeth.werner@ncdenr.gov', the PDF does not present it as a clickable hyperlink. However, the HTML wraps it in an <a href='mailto:...'> tag, which could be considered an enhancement rather than fabrication since the email text itself is present in the PDF's digital signature metadata.
findings.evidence: PDF digital signature: 'email=elizabeth.werner@ncdenr.gov'. HTML: 'elizabeth.werner@ncdenr.gov'. The email address text is present in the PDF but not as a hyperlink.

findings.description: The HTML contains a duplicate embedded image tag. There is a second tag with an empty alt attribute between Section I heading and the History/Background content that does not correspond to any meaningful content in the PDF at that location. The PDF page 2 does not have an image between the header and section content.
findings.evidence: HTML contains: '' appearing between the Table of Contents and Section I, which does not correspond to a distinct image in the PDF at that location.

findings.description: The document title 'MEMORANDUM' is styled as h1 with underline in the HTML, which is reasonable. However, the header area text (PAT MCCRORY/Governor, DONALD R. VAN DER VAART/Secretary, MICHAEL SCOTT/Acting Director) is rendered as a plain paragraph rather than preserving any visual hierarchy, though in the PDF these appear as distinct header elements. This is a minor structural choice difference.
findings.evidence:
PDF header has 'PAT MCCRORY Governor', 'DONALD R. VAN DER VAART Secretary', 'MICHAEL SCOTT Acting Director' as distinct styled header elements. HTML renders them in a single

block.
